sections.paragraph:
Original: נחשׁון

Transliteration: nachshôn

Phonetic: nakh-shone'

BDB Definition:

Nahshon = "enchanter"
  1. son of Amminadab and prince of the Judah at the first numbering in the wilderness; 5th in descent from Judah in the genealogy of Christ

Origin: from H5172

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
